headline: Tesla, Intel, Boeing, Capital One, and Many More Stocks to Watch This Week
summary: Roughly 90 S&P 500 Index companies are set to report earnings this week. Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh will appear before the Senate Banking Committee, and we’ll see data on pending home sales and purchasing managers’ activity..
